title: BLD-435: Version bump to 1.3.3
description: Walkthrough of the version bump from 1.3.2 to 1.3.3 in helix-cli

steps.title: package.json version field
steps.description: The version field was changed from "1.3.2" to "1.3.3". This is the primary version declaration that the npm publish workflow reads dynamically and that the CLI runtime reads via src/update/version.ts.

steps.title: package-lock.json top-level version
steps.description: The top-level version field in the lockfile was updated from "1.3.2" to "1.3.3" to stay in sync with package.json.

steps.title: package-lock.json packages[""] version
steps.description: The packages[""] entry (representing the root package) also had its version updated from "1.3.2" to "1.3.3". This is the second location in package-lock.json that tracks the package version.
